description_long: This object consists of two large, cylindrical metal barrels standing upright side by side. The barrels have a weathered, rusted appearance, with patches of brown corrosion and faded dark blue paint covering most of their surfaces. Each barrel features three prominent horizontal reinforcement bands encircling the body, giving them structural rigidity. The tops are open, revealing empty interiors, and there are no visible lids or covers. The barrels lack any handles, spouts, or additional attachments, and their surfaces are rough and matte due to extensive rust. These barrels are typical of those found in industrial or urban outdoor environments, often used for storage or waste collection.
description: Two large, open-topped, rusted metal barrels with faded blue paint and prominent horizontal bands, showing heavy weathering and no handles or lids.
description_view_0: Front view showing both barrels side by side, highlighting the rusted surfaces and horizontal bands.
description_view_1: Angled view with one barrel partially obscuring the other, emphasizing the cylindrical shape and open tops.
description_view_2: Similar to the front view, both barrels are fully visible, showing the weathered texture and open interiors.
description_view_3: Rear angled view with one barrel in front, again showing the open tops and extensive rust.
